text.title: QA Session-Based Test Management Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-session-based-test-management.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: duration_minutes outside [60,120]; split sums not 100; findings type not in enum; debrief_notes missing.
